Text.Page:
So, I traded the ore you gathered to an honest-looking castanic trader for some dowsing rods.

Obviously, cornering the water market in the desert would make me embarrassingly rich. I can live with that.

Want to help?

All right. Here are the dowsing rods. They work best in different regions.

If you find water, we'll be rich!

You found a large supply? Really? I was beginning to think that trader wasn't so honest.

Wait...it's deep underground?

How am I supposed to reach it? Magic? Too costly. Explosives? Too boomy. Giant sand worms?

...Maybe.
